hero.title:
A guest without an answer
finds another address.
hero.subtitle: MonaConcierge responds to every inquiry in under 5 seconds, day or night, in their language — so no opportunity is ever left unattended.
hero.proof: Trusted by select establishments in Monaco

social.label: Trusted by venues across Monaco and the Côte d'Azur

items.title: The late-night message that goes unanswered
items.desc: A guest who doesn't receive a reply before midnight will have booked your competitor by morning. They won't tell you why.

items.title: Three languages, one impossible standard
items.desc: Monaco's clientele is international. Matching the same quality of service in French, English and Russian — without the right tool — is simply not possible.

items.title: Your team is too talented for repetitive questions
items.desc: Opening hours, availability, menus — your staff answers the same questions dozens of times a day, on time they could spend with guests in front of them.

solution.title: One platform. Every guest. Every hour.
solution.tagline: Under 5 seconds. In any language. Every night.

items.title: Every message, answered instantly
items.desc: No gap in service, no guest left waiting. Your establishment is always open, even when you are not.

items.title: French, English, Russian — seamless
items.desc: Language is detected automatically. Every guest receives the same quality of reply, in their own language, the moment they write.

items.title: Your team, freed for what matters
items.desc: Routine questions are handled. Your staff is present for the experience — not the administration.

items.title: AI Concierge
items.desc: Responds with the precision and warmth of your best team member — any hour, any channel.

items.title: 3 Languages
items.desc: Automatic FR/EN/RU detection. No delay, no mistranslation, no dropped nuance.

items.title: Smart Reservations
items.desc: Guests book directly through the conversation, synced with your calendar.

items.title: VIP Memory
items.desc: Every returning guest is recognised and welcomed accordingly.

items.title: Review Management
items.desc: Personalised, considered responses to every Google review — drafted instantly.

items.title: Live Dashboard
items.desc: All conversations, bookings and reviews in a single view. Step in at any moment.

pricing.title: One clear rate
pricing.subtitle: Fully inclusive. No contract. 14-day free trial.
pricing.guarantee: No commitment. Cancel whenever you like.

trust.label: Launching with selected establishments in Monaco
trust.quote: Exactly the level of service our guests have always expected — now available around the clock.

an exceptional response?
cta.subtitle: Join Monaco's most discerning establishments.
